data.body:
We can punch them.

I'm not advocating punching them, to be clear, I'm just pointing out that it is a thing we can do to stop them, theoretically. So it's weird to ask "what can anyone do?" when there is something fairly obvious.

Whether we want to, or should, is another matter entirely.
